description: Conformance fixture expectations for pack verification. Any conforming verifier implementation must produce the specified outcome for each specimen.

notes.expectCode: primary error code MUST be present in errors array (null for pass)
notes.expectFailStage: this stage SHOULD report status=fail IF present (verifiers that short-circuit may skip later stages)

fixtures.name: golden_minimal
fixtures.description: Valid pack with 2 receipts, deterministic key, all stages pass

fixtures.name: tampered_receipt_content
fixtures.description: One byte changed in receipt_pack.jsonl (byte 62: c→x)

fixtures.name: duplicate_receipt_id
fixtures.description: Two receipts with receipt_id 'dup-001', re-signed. Python surfaces as E_MANIFEST_TAMPER on receipt_integrity (pack-level); TS surfaces as E_DUPLICATE_ID (direct). Both are valid per §13.
